title: 10 Pcs Fine Point Black Permanent Marker Pens, Marker Pen Quick Drying & Waterproof Pen Set for Doodling, Marking on Plastic Wood Metal Glass, Ideal for Office School Arts & Crafts Supplies (0.6mm)
features: Extensive Set: This comprehensive pack contains 10 black permanent marker pens, each delivering consistently rich, bold ink. They're perfect for a wide range of creative and professional tasks, meeting diverse needs.

Multipurpose Application: Whether it's for art, office work, or labeling, these black permanent markers excel on various surfaces including paper, plastic, wood, stone, metal, and glass, making them essential for any creative toolkit.

Durable & Quick-Drying Ink: Our black marker pens are crafted with fast-drying, waterproof, smear-proof, and fade-resistant ink. They ensure that your writing and drawings remain sharp, clear, and vivid over extended periods.

Precision Fine Point: Equipped with a fine tip for precise and detailed lines, these permanent marker pens black are ideal for intricate drawings, meticulous writing, and accurate labeling, greatly enhancing the clarity and neatness of your work.

Safe & User-Friendly: Acid-free, these permanent marker are suitable for users of all ages, including students and professionals. The ergonomic design ensures comfortable use during long creative sessions.
description: Discover the versatility and reliability of our 10-pack black permanent markers, designed to cater to both your creative and professional needs. Each marker in this set is crafted to deliver high-quality performance, whether you're an artist, student, or professional. With their rich, bold black ink, these markers are perfect for a wide range of applications. They work flawlessly on diverse surfaces, such as plastic, wood, metal, and glass, making them indispensable in both office and school settings, as well as in artistic endeavors. The ink's quick-drying, waterproof, and smear-proof qualities ensure your work remains pristine. Whether it's an important document, a piece of art, or everyday labeling, these markers will maintain the integrity of your work. The fade-resistant ink also means your markings will stand the test of time. The fine point tip of each marker is meticulously designed for precision. It allows for detailed and precise work, perfect for intricate designs, clear and legible writing, or accurate labeling. The precision contributes to a clean, professional look for all your projects. These markers are safe and user-friendly. Their acid-free composition makes them suitable for all age groups. The ergonomic design ensures comfort, even during prolonged use, making them a favorite among students and professionals alike. Upgrade your marking tools with our set of 10 black permanent markers, the perfect addition to your office, school, or art supplies, ensuring quality and durability in every stroke. Package Included: 10 x Black Permanent Marker Pens (0.6mm)
